name: local-readonly-helper
description: Versioned local read-only helper tools for workspace inspection and debugging.

tools.name: workspace_readiness
tools.description: Read startup, validation, Git, and delivery health for the current workspace.

tools.name: project_doctor
tools.description: Run the local Project Doctor summary without writing files or remote state.

tools.name: run_debug_guide
tools.description: Read the current run/debug guide with startup entry, runtime URL, and verification commands.

tools.name: coding_session_brief
tools.description: Read the current coding session brief with changed files, debug target, failures, and verification commands.

tools.name: local_validation_pack
tools.description: Read local validation presets with syntax, UI, fast/debug/integration smoke commands.

tools.name: coding_cockpit
tools.description: Read the coding cockpit with startup entry, debug target, changed files, failures, and validation commands.

tools.name: repo_map
tools.description: Read the current repository structure and symbol summary.

trust.notes: Versioned local manifest. Execution still requires explicit approval and only bridges to built-in read-only tools.
